title: AREA AGENCY ON AGING - 211info
text: COMMUNITY ACTION TEAM AREA AGENCY ON AGING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Area Agencies on Aging (AAA) provide a range of services to help older adults live safe, healthy, and independent lives. 125 N 17th Street Saint Helens, OR 97051 Eligibility: Age 60 and older Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-12:30pm and 1:30pm-5pm Email (503) 366-6581 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 366-6581 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Columbia County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8:30am-12:30pm and 1:30pm-5pm Services: Area Agencies on Aging Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - COMMUNITY ACTION AGENCY FOOD - HOME DELIVERED MEALS HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - AGING AND DISABILITY RESOURCE CONNECTION HOUSING/SHELTER - HOUSING PROGRAMS HOUSING/SHELTER - HOUSING REHABILITATION PROGRAM INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - OPTIONS COUNSELING INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - OREGON PROJECT INDEPENDENCE INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - OREGON PROJECT INDEPENDENCE – MEDICAID INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - SUPPORTIVE SERVICES FOR VETERAN FAMILIES INFORMATION SERVICES - FAMILY CAREGIVER SUPPORT PROGRAM LEGAL SERVICES - VETERANS SERVICES OFFICE MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - RCI REACH MONEY MANAGEMENT - MONEY MANAGEMENT PROGRAM UTILITIES - UTILITY ASSISTANCE PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
